title: Citrus
description: A Minimalistic WAILA (What Am I Looking At) mod built for Fabric
body:
# What does the Citrus mod do? 🍊
Citrus will add a minimalistic and simple HUD (Heads Up Display) which shows the user information about objects/mobs in game. 

Take a look at the gallery to see the information shown when looking at different objects.

![image of player looking at dropped block of diamond on endstone](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0ccf6259bec2aeb050f5f11e6c56b49f10716de1.png)



# What information does the mod display? 🍊
The mod displays a small variety of information based on what you're looking at.
### Blocks:
The block name, and item texture.
### Items:
The dropped item's name, texture, as well as the number of that item on the floor.
### Mobs:
The mob's name, as well as its current health / max health.
### Armor Info (Citrus 1.2.0+):
When the user puts on a piece of armor, the health of that piece of armor will show as either a percentage or a number.

# Armor Durability HUD (Heads up Display) 🍊
For this feature, make sure you download Citrus 1.2.0 or later. Adds a HUD on the bottom right showing the status of the armor that you're wearing. The Displayed health is color coded:
- White 🤍 (51-100% durability)
- Orange 🧡 (11-50% durability)
- Red ❤️ (0-10% durability)
  
The displayed health can be set to either a percent or a number.


![armor hud](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b227b1ae3f501dff783d4cdfc270922cd20f121a.png)



# How do I toggle certain HUD elements on or off? 🍊
Citrus 1.2.0+ uses Mod Menu, a mod that lets you view and configure the settings of the mods you have installed. Mod Menu is optional for Citrus but it is required if you would like to change the settings shown below.

![Citrus settings page](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d3da4080268fd614871fdee875119810f65338f2_0.webp)

### To configure Citrus 1.2.0+, 
1. Make sure you install Mod Menu along with Citrus
2. Look for the Mods button on your homepage/escape screen
![mods button location](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e2706df7f289ceda13394a79befa0cea7d50fee9_0.webp)

3. Locate Citrus in the Mod Menu and press the Configure button.
   ![configure button location](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/969cb0ff5259f278502edb4e7b858dda3cc8ac90_0.webp)
   
That will take you to the configuration page.
Thank you for trying Citrus! 🍊🧡
